bodySummary:

Thank you for choosing KFintech CRA for your NPS Services. We would
like to inform you, that the units for the contribution amount of
Rs.11000.00 have been credited on 3-Jun-2026 in your TierI account for
the Permanent Retirement Account Number (PRAN) XXXXXXXX1482. For more
details on the transaction, please refer to the attached Transaction
Statement. To view your password protected e-statement, please ent

subject: Monthly Transaction Statement for your NPS account with KFintech-CRA
snippet: Dear Subscriber, Please find attached the monthly Transaction Statement for your Permanent Retirement Account Number (XXXXXXXX1482). The statement con
bodySummary:
Dear Subscriber,

Please find attached the monthly Transaction Statement for your
Permanent Retirement Account Number (XXXXXXXX1482). The statement
contains all transactions settled in this financial year. To view your
password protected e-statement, please enter your 12 digit PRAN.

Please find below the new options released in KCRA system:

1)Multiple Scheme Framework (MSF): The Multiple Scheme Framework (MSF)
has been introduced by the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development
Author
